info.title: GivenSpecs.CommandLine
info.description:
Copyright (C) 2026 Ludwig Jossieaux
-f, --feature-path    Required. Path to the root of the feature files. A
relative path is expected unless --absolute-path is set
--absolute-path       Modify --feature-path to accept absolute path instead of
the default relative path
-n, --namespace       Required. Namespace to use for the generated test files
--with-ast-json       (Default: false) Generate also AST json files
--help                Display this help screen.
--version             Display version information.

options.name: --feature-path
options.description:

relative path is expected unless --absolute-path is set
